value:
Hi there,

Thanks for reaching out, and I'm sorry you're experiencing this issue with your account information on MWR. I understand how frustrating that must be.

To help you get this sorted quickly, I need a bit more information:

- When did you first notice that your sex and age had been reset?
- Have you made any recent changes to your account, or did this happen unexpectedly?
- Are you able to access your account settings right now?

Once I have these details, I'll be able to look into what happened and help get your information restored.

Thanks for your patience!
